title: Bridge Essay: Philosophy of psychiatry: theoretical advances and clinical implications.
concept: Scientific evidence against computationalism — cognition is embodied, embedded, enactive, extended.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Scientific evidence against computationalism — cognition is embodied, embedded, enactive, extended.

**Philosophy of psychiatry: theoretical advances and clinical implications.** - World psychiatry : official journal of the World Psychiatric Association (WPA) (2024). DOI: 10.1002/wps.21194. PMID: 38727058. Work at the intersection of philosophy and psychiatry has an extensive and influential history, and has received increased attention recently, with the emergence of professional associations and a growing literature. In this paper, we review key advances in work on philosophy and psychiatry, and their related clinical implications.
